requirement_topic.en: EDD Grid Interface — Voltage and Frequency Compatibility for BESS (230/400 V, 50 Hz)
requirement_topic.zh: EDD并网接口——BESS电压和频率兼容性（230/400 V，50 Hz）
requirement_topic.zht: EDD併網接口——BESS電壓和頻率兼容性（230/400 V，50 Hz）

summary.en: Électricité de Djibouti (EDD) is the sole national utility and grid operator. Djibouti's grid operates at 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz, reflecting the country's French/IEC technical legacy. All grid-connected BESS installations require an EDD grid-connection agreement and EDD technical approval before commissioning. Djibouti does not have a published national grid code specifically for BESS; EDD applies IEC-aligned requirements on a project-specific basis, drawing on IEC 62933 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) series standards including IEC 62933-2-1 (Unit Parameters and Testing Methods) and IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based systems). Djibouti has no strong national standards body — requirements must be confirmed directly with EDD and the Ministry of Energy for each project. Djibouti imports the majority of its electricity from Ethiopia via the Ethiopia–Djibouti interconnector; domestic BESS installations support grid stability and supplement geothermal and solar generation. Ministry of Energy approval is required alongside EDD connection agreement.
summary.zh: 吉布提电力公司（EDD）是唯一的国家电力公司和电网运营商。吉布提电网采用单相230 V、三相400 V、50 Hz，反映了该国的法国/IEC技术传统。所有并网BESS装置须在投入使用前取得EDD并网协议和EDD技术批准。吉布提没有专门针对BESS的已公布国家电网规范；EDD在项目基础上采用符合IEC的要求，参考IEC 62933（电化学储能系统）系列标准，包括IEC 62933-2-1（单元参数和测试方法）和IEC 62933-5-2（电化学系统安全要求）。吉布提没有强有力的国家标准机构——每个项目须直接向EDD和能源部确认要求。吉布提大部分电力通过埃塞-吉布提互联线从埃塞俄比亚进口；国内BESS装置支持电网稳定，并补充地热和太阳能发电。须同时取得能源部批准和EDD并网协议。
summary.zht: 吉布地電力公司（EDD）是唯一的國家電力公司和電網運營商。吉布地電網採用單相230 V、三相400 V、50 Hz，反映了該國的法國/IEC技術傳統。所有併網BESS裝置須在投入使用前取得EDD併網協議和EDD技術批准。吉布地沒有專門針對BESS的已公布國家電網規範；EDD在項目基礎上採用符合IEC的要求，參考IEC 62933（電化學儲能系統）系列標準，包括IEC 62933-2-1（單元參數和測試方法）和IEC 62933-5-2（電化學系統安全要求）。吉布地沒有強有力的國家標準機構——每個項目須直接向EDD和能源部確認要求。吉布地大部分電力通過埃塞-吉布地互聯線從埃塞俄比亞進口；國內BESS裝置支持電網穩定，並補充地熱和太陽能發電。須同時取得能源部批准和EDD併網協議。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference for EDD grid connection)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
Électricité de Djibouti (EDD) — grid-connection agreement required for all grid-connected BESS; no published national BESS grid code confirmed as of dataset date
Djibouti Ministry of Energy — project-level approval required alongside EDD connection agreement

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2017 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220 V single-phase and 380 V three-phase. This is the critical difference: Djibouti operates at 230/400 V whereas China operates at 220/380 V — both use 50 Hz frequency but voltage levels differ. BESS PCS (bidirectional inverters) parameterised for China's 220/380 V grid must be reconfigured and retested for Djibouti's 230/400 V grid. A step-up/step-down transformer may also be required depending on system design. Chinese GB/T 36558 grid-connection compliance is not accepted by EDD.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2017（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、单相220 V、三相380 V。这是关键差异：吉布提为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V——两者均使用50 Hz频率但电压等级不同。针对中国220/380 V电网配置的BESS储能变流器（双向逆变器）须重新配置并重新测试以适应吉布提230/400 V电网。根据系统设计，还可能需要配置升降压变压器。中国GB/T 36558并网合规不被EDD接受。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2017（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、單相220 V、三相380 V。這是關鍵差異：吉布地為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V——兩者均使用50 Hz頻率但電壓等級不同。針對中國220/380 V電網配置的BESS儲能變流器（雙向逆變器）須重新配置並重新測試以適應吉布地230/400 V電網。根據系統設計，還可能需要配置升降壓變壓器。中國GB/T 36558併網合規不被EDD接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems; not accepted by EDD)
GB/T 34120-2017 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network; not accepted by EDD)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Critical gap: China and Djibouti share 50 Hz frequency but have different grid voltages — Djibouti 230/400 V vs. China 220/380 V. Do NOT assume voltage compatibility. BESS PCS must be reconfigured and retested for Djibouti's 230/400 V grid; a step-up/step-down transformer may be required. Chinese GB/T 36558 grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals are not accepted by EDD. Key actions: (a) engage EDD at the earliest project stage to confirm connection agreement technical requirements and confirm whether IEC 62933 evidence is required; (b) reconfigure and retest PCS voltage protection thresholds, ride-through settings, and reactive power capability for 230/400 V at 50 Hz; (c) confirm SCADA/communication protocol required by EDD for BESS monitoring (IEC 61850 or project-specific); (d) obtain Ministry of Energy project approval alongside EDD connection agreement — Djibouti has no published national BESS grid code so all requirements must be confirmed project by project.
gap.zh: 关键差距：中国和吉布提共享50 Hz频率，但电网电压不同——吉布提为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V。切勿假设电压兼容。BESS储能变流器须重新配置并重新测试以适应吉布提230/400 V电网；可能需要配置升降压变压器。中国GB/T 36558并网合规和NEA审批不被EDD接受。主要行动：（a）在项目最早阶段与EDD接触，确认并网协议技术要求并确认是否需要IEC 62933证据；（b）重新配置并重新测试PCS电压保护阈值、穿越参数及无功功率能力，以适应50 Hz下的230/400 V；（c）确认EDD对BESS监控所要求的SCADA/通信协议（IEC 61850或项目专属）；（d）同时取得能源部项目批准和EDD并网协议——吉布提没有已公布的国家BESS电网规范，所有要求须逐项目确认。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：中國和吉布地共享50 Hz頻率，但電網電壓不同——吉布地為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V。切勿假設電壓兼容。BESS儲能變流器須重新配置並重新測試以適應吉布地230/400 V電網；可能需要配置升降壓變壓器。中國GB/T 36558併網合規和NEA審批不被EDD接受。主要行動：（a）在項目最早階段與EDD接觸，確認併網協議技術要求並確認是否需要IEC 62933證據；（b）重新配置並重新測試PCS電壓保護閾值、穿越參數及無功功率能力，以適應50 Hz下的230/400 V；（c）確認EDD對BESS監控所要求的SCADA/通訊協議（IEC 61850或項目專屬）；（d）同時取得能源部項目批准和EDD併網協議——吉布地沒有已公布的國家BESS電網規範，所有要求須逐項目確認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EDD grid-connection agreement and Ministry of Energy approval are required for all grid-connected BESS in Djibouti; no published national BESS grid code — technical requirements are project-specific and must be confirmed directly with EDD
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Djibouti

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Djibouti and China share 50 Hz grid frequency but have different operating voltages — Djibouti 230/400 V vs. China 220/380 V; do not assume voltage compatibility. Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance is not accepted by EDD. PCS must be reconfigured and retested for Djibouti's 230/400 V grid. Djibouti has no published national BESS grid code and no strong national standards body; all technical requirements must be obtained directly from EDD and the Ministry of Energy on a project-by-project basis. Engage EDD at the earliest project stage before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 吉布提和中国共享50 Hz电网频率，但运行电压不同——吉布提为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V；切勿假设电压兼容。中国GB/T BESS并网合规不被EDD接受。储能变流器须重新配置并重新测试以适应吉布提230/400 V电网。吉布提没有已公布的国家BESS电网规范，也没有强有力的国家标准机构；所有技术要求须逐项目直接向EDD和能源部获取。请在设备采购最终确定前的项目最早阶段与EDD接触。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 吉布地和中國共享50 Hz電網頻率，但運行電壓不同——吉布地為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V；切勿假設電壓兼容。中國GB/T BESS併網合規不被EDD接受。儲能變流器須重新配置並重新測試以適應吉布地230/400 V電網。吉布地沒有已公布的國家BESS電網規範，也沒有強有力的國家標準機構；所有技術要求須逐項目直接向EDD和能源部獲取。請在設備採購最終確定前的項目最早階段與EDD接觸。

requirement_topic.en: EDD Grid Code Compliance — No Published National BESS Grid Code; Informal IEC-Aligned Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: EDD电网规范合规——无已公布的国家BESS电网规范；非正式IEC对标要求
requirement_topic.zht: EDD電網規範合規——無已公布的國家BESS電網規範；非正式IEC對標要求

summary.en: Djibouti has no confirmed published national grid code specifically governing BESS grid-connection technical requirements. EDD as the sole utility applies informal IEC-aligned requirements drawn from international best practice on a project-specific basis. This is a direct consequence of Djibouti's lack of a strong national standards body: there is no equivalent to Qatar's Kahramaa Grid Code, Saudi Arabia's SEC Grid Code, or the EU grid connection network codes. BESS project developers must negotiate technical requirements directly with EDD through the grid-connection agreement process. IEC 62933 series standards are the expected international technical framework EDD would reference. The Ministry of Energy may impose additional approval requirements at the project level. All technical requirements — including protection relay settings, reactive power capability, response times, and SCADA/communication protocols — must be confirmed in writing with EDD before equipment design is finalised.
summary.zh: 吉布提没有已确认的专门针对BESS并网技术要求的已公布国家电网规范。作为唯一电力公司，EDD在项目基础上采用非正式的IEC对标要求，参考国际最佳实践。这是吉布提缺乏强有力国家标准机构的直接后果：没有类似卡塔尔Kahramaa电网规范、沙特SEC电网规范或欧盟并网网络规范的等效文件。BESS项目开发商须通过并网协议流程直接与EDD协商技术要求。IEC 62933系列标准是EDD预期引用的国际技术框架。能源部可能在项目层面施加额外审批要求。所有技术要求——包括保护继电器整定值、无功功率能力、响应时间及SCADA/通信协议——须在设备设计最终确定前以书面形式向EDD确认。
summary.zht: 吉布地沒有已確認的專門針對BESS併網技術要求的已公布國家電網規範。作為唯一電力公司，EDD在項目基礎上採用非正式的IEC對標要求，參考國際最佳實踐。這是吉布地缺乏強有力國家標準機構的直接後果：沒有類似卡達Kahramaa電網規範、沙特SEC電網規範或歐盟併網網絡規範的等效文件。BESS項目開發商須通過併網協議流程直接與EDD協商技術要求。IEC 62933系列標準是EDD預期引用的國際技術框架。能源部可能在項目層面施加額外審批要求。所有技術要求——包括保護繼電器整定值、無功功率能力、響應時間及SCADA/通訊協議——須在設備設計最終確定前以書面形式向EDD確認。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods (expected EDD technical reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected EDD technical reference)
Électricité de Djibouti (EDD) — project-specific grid-connection agreement (no published national BESS grid code confirmed as of dataset date)
Djibouti Ministry of Energy — project-level approval required; no published national BESS regulatory framework confirmed as of dataset date

summary.en: China operates a structured national grid code system for BESS under the National Energy Administration (NEA), with GB/T 36558-2023 as the primary technical standard for grid-connected electrochemical storage systems. Grid operators (State Grid Corporation of China, China Southern Power Grid) apply uniform national technical requirements for BESS connection. Chinese BESS manufacturers benefit from established certification pathways and NEA-authorised testing procedures. None of these Chinese national grid code compliance routes, NEA approvals, or GB/T 36558 certifications are accepted by EDD or the Djibouti Ministry of Energy. The absence of a Djibouti national grid code means there is no straightforward equivalence or mutual recognition pathway available.
summary.zh: 中国通过国家能源局（NEA）对BESS实施结构化国家电网规范体系，GB/T 36558-2023是并网电化学储能系统的主要技术标准。电网运营商（国家电网、南方电网）对BESS接入采用统一的国家技术要求。中国BESS制造商受益于成熟的认证路径和NEA授权测试程序。上述中国国家电网规范合规路径、NEA审批及GB/T 36558认证均不被EDD或吉布提能源部接受。吉布提国家电网规范的缺失意味着目前没有直接的等效或相互认可途径。
summary.zht: 中國通過國家能源局（NEA）對BESS實施結構化國家電網規範體系，GB/T 36558-2023是併網電化學儲能系統的主要技術標準。電網運營商（國家電網、南方電網）對BESS接入採用統一的國家技術要求。中國BESS製造商受益於成熟的認證路徑和NEA授權測試程序。上述中國國家電網規範合規路徑、NEA審批及GB/T 36558認證均不被EDD或吉布地能源部接受。吉布地國家電網規範的缺失意味著目前沒有直接的等效或相互認可途徑。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems; not accepted in Djibouti)
GB/T 34131-2017 — 电化学储能电站用锂离子电池管理系统技术规范 (Technical Specification for Lithium-Ion Battery Management System for Electrochemical Energy Storage Station; not accepted in Djibouti)

gap.en: Gap: Djibouti has no published national BESS grid code and no strong national standards body. Chinese GB/T 36558 and NEA approvals have no equivalence or recognition pathway in Djibouti. All grid-connection technical requirements must be negotiated directly with EDD on a project-by-project basis. This creates regulatory uncertainty that project developers should plan for: (a) allow additional project lead time for EDD technical review and negotiation; (b) document all agreed technical requirements in the EDD connection agreement before equipment procurement; (c) prepare IEC 62933-based technical documentation as the expected international framework EDD would reference; (d) confirm Ministry of Energy project approval requirements separately from EDD connection process; (e) note that the absence of a published grid code increases the risk of late-stage technical requirement changes — early EDD engagement is essential.
gap.zh: 差距：吉布提没有已公布的国家BESS电网规范，也没有强有力的国家标准机构。中国GB/T 36558和NEA审批在吉布提没有等效或认可途径。所有并网技术要求须逐项目直接与EDD协商。这造成了项目开发商应予规划的监管不确定性：（a）为EDD技术审查和协商预留额外项目周期；（b）在设备采购前将所有议定技术要求记录于EDD并网协议；（c）以IEC 62933为基础准备技术文件，作为EDD预期引用的国际框架；（d）独立于EDD并网流程确认能源部项目审批要求；（e）注意缺乏已公布电网规范增加了后期阶段技术要求变更的风险——早期与EDD接触至关重要。
gap.zht: 差距：吉布地沒有已公布的國家BESS電網規範，也沒有強有力的國家標準機構。中國GB/T 36558和NEA審批在吉布地沒有等效或認可途徑。所有併網技術要求須逐項目直接與EDD協商。這造成了項目開發商應予規劃的監管不確定性：（a）為EDD技術審查和協商預留額外項目週期；（b）在設備採購前將所有議定技術要求記錄於EDD併網協議；（c）以IEC 62933為基礎準備技術文件，作為EDD預期引用的國際框架；（d）獨立於EDD併網流程確認能源部項目審批要求；（e）注意缺乏已公布電網規範增加了後期階段技術要求變更的風險——早期與EDD接觸至關重要。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EDD connection agreement required for all grid-connected BESS; no published national grid code for BESS — all technical requirements are project-specific and subject to direct EDD and Ministry of Energy negotiation
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — NEA-governed national grid code framework and GB/T 36558 apply to all grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Djibouti

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Djibouti has no published national BESS grid code and no strong national standards body. Chinese GB/T 36558 grid-connection compliance has no recognition pathway in Djibouti. All technical grid-connection requirements must be confirmed directly with EDD and the Ministry of Energy on a project-specific basis. Prepare IEC 62933-based documentation as the expected international technical framework. Budget additional time and resources for direct EDD technical negotiation — the absence of a published grid code means requirements are not publicly verifiable in advance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 吉布提没有已公布的国家BESS电网规范，也没有强有力的国家标准机构。中国GB/T 36558并网合规在吉布提没有认可途径。所有技术并网要求须逐项目直接向EDD和能源部确认。以IEC 62933为基础准备文件，作为预期国际技术框架。为直接EDD技术协商预留额外时间和资源——缺乏已公布电网规范意味着要求无法预先公开核实。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 吉布地沒有已公布的國家BESS電網規範，也沒有強有力的國家標準機構。中國GB/T 36558併網合規在吉布地沒有認可途徑。所有技術併網要求須逐項目直接向EDD和能源部確認。以IEC 62933為基礎準備文件，作為預期國際技術框架。為直接EDD技術協商預留額外時間和資源——缺乏已公布電網規範意味著要求無法預先公開核實。
